data.body: DONE (commit 670957ac). The full recommended ruff set (E,F,W,I,UP,B) now GATES with zero violations: I001 auto-fixed + promoted (e31d4dd2); then F401 (facades got __all__ + genuine removals), E501 (reflows + 7 justified noqa), F841/B007/E402/B017/B904/B905 all fixed, and select promoted to [E,F,W,I,UP,B]. Foundation (prior): gating green, ruff format applied + --check gates in CI, integration tier wired into CI. Two opus subagents (implement + review); review verdict ship-it; riskiest reconciler F401 removals independently verified unconsumed (883 reconciler + live DIG green). Full suite 1675 passed; ruff+format clean. AC met — closing.
